nasb.text: Therefore, when I have finished this, and have put my seal on this fruit of theirs, I will go on by way of you to Spain.

esv.text: When therefore I have completed this and have delivered to them what has been collected, I will leave for Spain by way of you.

cnv.text: 等我辦好這件事，把這筆款項安全地交了給他們，我就要路過你們那裡到西班牙去。

ccb.text: 等我办完这件事，将捐款交付他们之后，我就会途经你们那里去西班牙。

csbs.text: 所以，当我完成了这件事，向他们印证了这事的成果，我就要经过你们那里，往西班牙去。
